match.userMessage:
Modern social-first product photography with tactile editorial energy, high-key and airy, SCARLETT wearing a light summer outfit suitable for beach sits at a simple vanity in an interior studio, lifting a small white box with fingers gently tracing the coral seal in a moment of potential energy, mid-breath and muscles tensed, white walls glowing under bright natural window light cutting across in clean directional beams creating soft shadows, minimal bright studio environment with warm sunlight tones dominating the sparse background, shallow depth of field focusing on the hands and box while the walls recede into airy bokeh, crisp true-to-life color grading with slight warmth in highlights and lifted shadows, eye-level angle with natural micro-movement framing.

  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [CHARACTER REF]: SCARLETT - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 2 [LOCATION REF]: INT. BONDI STUDIO - MORNING - White walls with sunlight cutting across
    
    IMPORTANT: Reference images CARRY the visual identity of their labeled objects. When the prompt names an UPPERCASE element token, render it faithfully from its ELEMENT REF image — do not generate a new version from the prose. When the prompt names a LOCATION REF, use that image for the environment, lighting, and architectural identity. Prose describes how things are framed, lit, and positioned in the shot — it does not redefine what the reference already shows.
  </reference-images>
